Class BasePotion

java.lang.Object
logic.base.BaseItem
logic.base.BasePotion
All Implemented Interfaces:
Consumable
Direct Known Subclasses:
BigHealthPotion, HealPotion, MediumHealthPotion, SmallHealthPotion
public abstract class BasePotion extends BaseItem implements Consumable
Abstract base class for all potions. Potions are stackable consumable items that restore the player's health.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    BasePotion(String name, int stat)
    Creates a new potion with the given name and heal amount.

    Consumes this potion, restoring the player's health by stat points.

  • Constructor Details

    • BasePotion

      public BasePotion(String name, int stat)
      Creates a new potion with the given name and heal amount. Potions stack up to 30 per slot.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the potion
      stat - the amount of health restored when consumed

  • Method Details

    • consume

      public void consume(Player p)
      Consumes this potion, restoring the player's health by stat points.
      Specified by:
      consume in interface Consumable
      Parameters:
      p - the player who consumes this potion

    • getStat

      public int getStat()
      Returns the heal amount provided by this potion.
      Returns:
      heal amount

    • setStat

      public void setStat(int stat)
      Sets the heal amount of this potion. Value cannot go below zero.
      Parameters:
      stat - the new heal amount
